Photo shared by USYD Chocolate Society on March 01, 2026 tagging @usu.usyd. May be a doodle of bagel, poster, card and text that says "Tuesday 3 March KRISPY KREME 11AM til 1PM @ ISL USU Clubs".

Meet our 2026 Chocsoc President: Amo! 

Being a constant steady and reliable backbone for our society and members, Amo brings the swag and positive vibes✨, reminding us to just keep swimming 🤿🐟 even when we’re down.

Besides joining chocsoc, our best decision is making you our President! We Amor you <3! Chocsoc President Amorino Tooongart! 💝🍫

“He stood unshaken, a voice in the storm
A man of conviction, a heart reborn
He spoke the truth when the cost was high
He lived for CHOCSOC, unafraid to die”
😤😤

Holding down the fort for yet another year, we are proud to have 🩺Dr Max Ma* on board with us again!
Although he still barely holds his drinks, we love our 2026 Vice President: Max Ma!

*still not an actual doctor… YET!

We’re not quite sure about undefeated in drinking 🍻… but we are sure that with Dhinesh, chocsoc is undefeatable💪! With a goofy laid back aura, he definitely has given us whiplash with how trustworthy and reliable he can come to be - half of our events wouldn’t be possible without Dhinesh! 

Kinder Joy? More like Chocsoc’s Joy! We welcome our Joy Kindler Dhinesh Ponnappan as our 2026 Vice President! 🤗

Whittaker… risk taker… mood maker 😝.
If we had a penny for every time Allison had showed up and supported Chocsoc, we might be free of our debt! Just spending time with Allison heals the tit and tats we suffer through the academic semester 🥺💖.
I know my life could hit the ‘sweet max’ 🍫 with a little bit of Chocsoc’s 2026 Secretary in it… Allison Liu!

James is a breath of fresh air in Chocsoc, certainly sharing similarities with his favourite kitkat 🍫! Although you may have gained 0kg, Chocsoc is lucky to have gained an irreplaceable - and currently still the tallest - member like you!

It might be a bad idea to play ‘Jazz’ 🎷around James as he might commit a ‘Crime’ to our Choctreasure… just kidding! We ‘Treasure’ you a lot, Chocsoc’s 2026 Treasurer: James Lee! 💎✨

‘Don’t get the deal’ of having Tiffany in Chocsoc? Well, let me tell you! Haven’t you seen our beautiful, cohesive, colour themed feed? That’s all thanks to Tiffany! Don’t confuse this beauty with seashells (although I agree it’s hard)!

Tiffany is like the strawberry on top of the cake, always keeping our socials looking cute, fresh and fun 🍓🍰!
